name: Pecan Loaves
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt and spices into a bowl.
2. Stir in sugar, pecans and oats.
3. Add remaining ingredients; stir only until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Pour batter into 3 greased empty cans with about 2 cups capacity each.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 50 minutes.
6. Loosen edges, remove from cans immediately and cool thoroughly.
7. Wrap cooled bread and store for one day before slicing.
Note: For variety, use 1 cup chopped pitted dates or prunes instead of pecans in the above recipe.
